title: neltuma chilensis
intro: Neltuma chilensis, also known as Neltuma, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Annonaceae. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and inflammation, due to their antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. Neltuma has been used to alleviate symptoms such as stomach pain, diarrhea, and fever, and has been shown to have potential benefits in reducing stress and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of Neltuma typically involve drying the plant's leaves and stems, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
